---
title: Project Overview
---

## Research Questions

1. How do hiring patterns differ for men vs. women across industries?
2. Do gender-based employment disparities vary between red and blue states?

## Dataset

- **Primary:** Lightcast 2024 Job Postings (~72,000 records after ETL)
- **Supplementary:** IPUMS Household data (1.3M rows)

## Team

| Name | GitHub |
|------|--------|
| Julie Ngo Tran | [@frjulie8-proj](https://github.com/frjulie8-proj) |
| Alina Chen | [@alinayanxi](https://github.com/alinayanxi) |
| Yifan Cui | [@cyifan25dot](https://github.com/cyifan25-dot) |
| Zhiyang Guo | [@guozyang6](https://github.com/guozyang-6) |
| Antara Sudhir | [@sudhirantara](https://github.com/sudhir-antara) |

## Project Phases

| Phase | Description | Status |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| 1 | Repo setup, ETL pipeline, site initialized | Done |
| 2 | Data extraction, relational table build | Done |
| 3 | EDA, skill gap analysis, site restructure | In Progress |
| 4 | ML methods — clustering | Upcoming |
| 5 | NLP methods — job description mining | Upcoming |
